---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for MemOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem. e.g. "My agent always loses context after restarting..."

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

How would this be used in practice? What agent/LLM setup benefits?

## Would You Be Willing to Contribute This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this and submit a PR
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] No, requesting for others to implement

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples from other projects.
